Moss Bluff Storage Conditions for 3/23/2026


Notice Text:

The following restriction will be in place on the Moss Bluff Storage (Moss Bluff) system for Gas Day March 23, 2026:

Moss Bluff has scheduled and sealed injections. No increases in injections will be accepted.

Customers are advised that capacity may become available as the nomination and confirmation process continues throughout the day.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.



BackPrint
